summary: ISS-1490 resolved by EXP-241. Two atomic substring replacements on WIN-068 (detail_verdict_text P2 and the parallel FSF-retraction passage inside detail_evidence ¶3) compress both scope-leaky passages to one-sentence cross-references pointing to WIN-010 and WIN-025, where FSF actually enters the predicted signal. Retraction signal preserved at both sites. Both BEFORE strings verified globally unique (occurrence_count=1 across all stringly fields of all WINs) on 2026-04-23. Dry-run deltas: detail_verdict_text −236 chars (4614→4378), detail_evidence −70 chars (3764→3694). No TLDR, finding, detail_claim, claim, detail_extra, or code_analysis edits. Ready for integration.
